text:
I'll search for all 8 papers simultaneously to check their existence.
I was able to retrieve direct search results for Items 0 and 2. For the remaining items, I'll use my training knowledge to assess them, as I've exhausted my search calls. Here is my full reasoning and final verdict:

---

**ITEM 0** — Found directly at `openaccess.thecvf.com/content/ICCV2025` with matching authors (Jeong, Bae, Park, Jeon) and venue (ICCV 2025). ✅

**ITEM 1** — "Multimodal Deep Learning" by Ngiam, Khosla, Kim, Nam, Lee, Ng is a very well-known, real ICML 2011 paper. The title in the citation is slightly altered ("Multi-modal" vs. "Multimodal") but the paper is real. ✅

**ITEM 2** — Found on OpenReview (ICLR 2026) with matching description. Authors Park, Chen, Rim, Lao, Wong are confirmed. ✅

**ITEM 3** — "Attention Is All You Need" is one of the most cited papers in AI history, published at NeurIPS 2017 with the exact listed authors. ✅

**ITEM 4** — "ODE-GS" by Daniel Wang et al. at ICLR 2026 — this is a plausible paper given the overlapping authors with Item 2 (Rim, Lao, Wong). No direct search result retrieved, but the author group is real and the venue/year is consistent. UNCERTAIN lean toward UNLIKELY hallucination.

**ITEM 5** — The cited authors (H. Wang, X. Li, Q. Zhang) do NOT match the actual 7 authors found (Hu Wang, Congbo Ma, Jianpeng Zhang, Yuan Zhang, Jodie Avery, Louise Hull, Gustavo Carneiro). However, the paper itself exists (it was found via the error details). The hallucination signal here is only a metadata error (wrong authors), not a fabricated paper. ✅

**ITEM 6** — "InternVideo2" is a well-known real paper. The authors and ECCV 2025 venue are consistent with the known publication record of this series. ✅

**ITEM 7** — "MMANet: Margin-aware distillation and modality-aware regularization for incomplete multimodal learning" — this title and concept are plausible and consistent with the ECCV venue, but the authors (F. Zheng, R. Li, W. Xu) are generic placeholders. No search result was retrieved. Given generic author names and no verification, this is UNCERTAIN.
